name: Shrimp Crescents
recipeInstructions:
Special equipment: 3-inch round cookie cutter.
1. Prepare the filling by combining shrimp, cream cheese, dill, tarragon, salt, and Tabasco sauce in a mixing bowl. Set aside.
2. Prepare the sour cream pastry by combining all ingredients; mix well. Knead dough and divide into two halves. Roll each half into a thin rectangle.
3. Cut rectangles into 3-inch rounds using the cookie cutter.
4. Place a spoonful of filling on half of each round. Fold over the other half to create a half moon shape.
5. Press lightly with a fork to seal edges.
6. Arrange crescents on a well-greased baking sheet and brush each one with beaten egg.
7. Bake 10 to 15 minutes at 350°F.
